headline: You Can Buy 1 Share of Costco for Less Than $1,000 Right Now. Here's Why the Price Could Go Up by the End of 2030.
summary: Costco trades at a premium to every discount retail peer. Here's why this warehouse giant could still keep climbing through 2030.
